author: Sadegh Shokatian
name: 11L + Tight SWA + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + XSA4
blurb: 11 layers, 512d, 8H/4KV, MLP 3x relu-squared. Tight SWA (scale<0.2, every 50 steps, ~12 checkpoints). XSA on last 4 layers. Partial RoPE (16/64 dims). LN Scale 1/sqrt(layer_idx+1). SmearGate + BigramHash(2048). OrthoInit + muP. Int6 per-row + zstd-22. FA3 Hopper. Muon WD=0.04, LR=0.025.
